label: The Baffle Vault
description: The Baffle Vault serves as the enclosed storage room of The Glarewright Exchange, built as a narrow basalt chamber sealed behind matte-faced panels that blunt Brineshade’s terminator glare. Racked wall frames and compartmented drawers segregate reflector foils, baffle vanes, and mineral-glass blanks by standardized dimensions used along the city’s surveyed approach lines. Salt-cemented flooring and raised plinths keep stock above dust-trap channels that capture the planet’s mineral haze. A fixed inspection shelf under hooded luminance permits verification of coatings and edge tolerances without exposing the room to exterior flare.
